ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "book_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the booking (from the booking system) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the booking */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the facility is located */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the facility (e.g., Reading Rooms, Meeting Rooms) */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific facility being booked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., Confirmed, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was created */,
  "from_time" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "to_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "created_time" TEXT /* Time the booking was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the booking */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the booking */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the booking */,
  "last_modified_time" TEXT /* Last modification time of the booking */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the booking */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether a notification has been sent for the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES booking_status ("status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity for facilities in this category */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* List of equipment available in facilities of this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the facility is located */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., Available, Unavailable, Maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
